description_long: This is a modern, rectangular wooden sideboard or credenza with a warm, medium-brown wood grain finish. The front features two sets of double doors on either side, each with sleek metallic handles, and a central column of four pull-out drawers, also with matching handles. The cabinet stands on four short, sturdy metallic legs, giving it a slightly elevated profile and a contemporary look. The top surface is flat and spacious, suitable for displaying decorative items or for practical use. The back and sides are plain, with the wood grain pattern continuing seamlessly around the object. The overall design is minimalist, functional, and well-suited for urban interiors such as lobbies, offices, or apartment living rooms.
description: A modern wooden sideboard with double doors, central drawers, and metallic handles, elevated on short metal legs. The design is minimalist and functional, with a warm wood finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing two sets of double doors with metallic handles and four central drawers, all elevated on metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain wood grain side panel and the depth of the cabinet, with legs visible underneath.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a continuous wood grain panel with no visible handles, doors, or drawers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain wood grain side and the cabinet's depth.
